articles.title: JJ Redick Outlines Two Keys for Lakers vs. Rockets Series
articles.original_title: JJ Redick Gives 2 Keys To Lakers’ Series With Rockets
articles.summary: Lakers head coach JJ Redick identified two primary factors the team must execute to succeed against the physically imposing Houston Rockets in the first round. He emphasized the need to handle the Rockets’ size and maintain disciplined defense.
key_points: Control the paint and limit the Rockets’ interior scoring opportunities.

articles.title: LeBron James Relieved to Avoid Play‑In Tournament
articles.original_title: Lakers News: LeBron James Happy To Not Be In Play-In Tournament
articles.summary: LeBron James expressed satisfaction that the Lakers secured a direct playoff berth, avoiding the NBA Play‑In Tournament for the first time since its inception in 2021. The team’s 3‑0 record in previous play‑in games was noted, but James prefers the certainty of a standard playoff seed.
key_points: The Lakers clinched a top‑seed position, eliminating the need for a play‑in game.
James highlighted the physical toll and scheduling challenges of the play‑in format.
Avoiding the play‑in gives the Lakers extra rest before the first round.

articles.title: Avdija's 41 Powers Blazers Past Suns, Secures No. 7 Seed
articles.original_title: Blazers ride Avdija's 41 over Suns, grab 7th seed
articles.summary: Deni Avdija erupted for 41 points as Portland erased an 11‑point fourth‑quarter deficit to beat Phoenix 114‑110. The victory clinched the Western Conference’s seventh seed for the Blazers.
key_points: Avdija’s career‑high 41 points led the comeback.
Portland overcame an 11‑point hole in the final period.
The win locked the No. 7 seed in the West for the Blazers.

articles.title: LaMelo Ball Fined $35K for Reckless Contact with Bam Adebayo
articles.original_title: Hornets' Ball fined $35K for 'reckless' Bam play
articles.summary: The NBA fined Charlotte’s LaMelo Ball $35,000 for “unnecessary and reckless” contact with Miami’s Bam Adebayo during Tuesday’s play‑in game. An additional $25,000 penalty was issued for profanity used in a post‑game interview.
key_points: $35,000 fine for the on‑court incident with Adebayo.

key_points: Stream interruption lasted about two minutes in overtime.
Fans missed a critical Hornets possession.
The incident raised questions about streaming platform stability for NBA games.

key_points: Dončić scored in his 30th straight game, the longest streak for a non‑U.S. player.
His scoring average during the streak remains above 30 points per game.

key_points: The schedule includes fewer back‑to‑back games, limiting fatigue.

Redick suggests the format could extend LeBron's postseason effectiveness.
